/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 7.0.0 -current_version 7.0.0 -o librtaudio.7.0.0.dylib -install_name @rpath/librtaudio.7.dylib CMakeFiles/rtaudio.dir/RtAudio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtaudio.dir/rtaudio_c.cpp.o  -framework CoreAudio -framework CoreFoundation
